# openai_spend_alert (Resource)

Creates an organization spend alert.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openai_spend_alert" "test" {
  currency         = "USD"
  interval         = "month"
  threshold_amount = 1000000
  notification_channel = {
    type           = "email"
    recipients     = ["finance@example.com"]
    subject_prefix = "OpenAI Spend Alert"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `currency` (String) The currency for the threshold amount (e.g. `USD`).
- `interval` (String) The interval for the spend alert (e.g. `month`).
- `notification_channel` (Attributes) Email notification settings for a spend alert. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--notification_channel))
- `threshold_amount` (Number) The alert threshold amount, in cents.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Spend alert ID.

<a id="nestedatt--notification_channel"></a>
### Nested Schema for `notification_channel`

Required:

- `recipients` (Set of String) Email addresses that receive the spend alert notification.
- `type` (String) The notification channel type. Currently only `email` is supported.

Optional:

- `subject_prefix` (String) Optional subject prefix for alert emails.
